---
title: workflowr demo
author: Peter Carbonetto
output: workflowr::wflow_html
---

This is a short R Markdown to illustrate usage of workflowr.

```{r knitr-opts, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = "#",collapse = TRUE,results = "hold",
                      fig.align = "center",dpi = 120)
```

Load ggplot2 and cowplot:

```{r load-pkgs, message=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
```

Loat the "diamonds" data set:

```{r diamonds}
data(diamonds)
```

Plot diamonds' weight (in carats) vs. price, colored by clarity:

```{r diamonds-scatterplot, fig.height=2.5, fig.width=4}
set.seed(3)
n <- nrow(diamonds)
diamonds <- diamonds[sample(n,1000),]
ggplot(diamonds,aes(x = carat,y = price,color = clarity)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_cowplot()
```
